prompt: Professional logo design for a marketing agency called 'MM AGENCY.' displayed on a pure black background (#0A0A0A). Ultra clean minimalist typography logo. The text 'MM AGENCY.' is rendered in a bold geometric sans-serif typeface (similar to Futura or Montserrat Heavy), all uppercase, perfectly centered. The letters 'MM AGENCY' are pure white (#FFFFFF). The period/dot at the end is a vibrant electric cyan color (#00E3FF), slightly larger than normal, acting as the brand accent. Wide letter-spacing between characters. No icons, no symbols, no decorative elements — pure typography only. The composition is perfectly balanced with generous negative space. Professional logo presentation, vector-quality sharpness, crisp clean edges on every letterform. Studio-quality brand identity mockup on matte black background. 8K resolution, graphic design, brand identity.
